features.name: explicit type cast applied to arithmetic expression in addition
features.description: Code should include an explicit type cast using '() syntax applied to an int arithmetic expression (var+literal) that is then used in addition with a different-width integer literal

features.name: foreach loop iterating over 1D unpacked array with int index
features.description: Code should include a foreach loop that iterates over a 1D unpacked array using an int-typed loop variable

features.name: shortint variable declaration for 1D unpacked array
features.description: Code should include a shortint (16-bit signed) variable declared as a 1D unpacked array with fixed size
